chunks.text: License for Fancybox License for Fancybox Fancybox "is a tool for displaying images, html content and multi-media in a Mac-style 'lightbox' that floats overtop of web page." Fancybox is used as part of the export HTML feature of Vergil. On October 28

f the export HTML feature of Vergil. On October 28, 2011, http://fancybox.net said: "It was built using the jQuery library. Licensed under both MIT and GPL licenses " http://docs.jquery.com/Licensing said: The MIT License is recommended for most proj

said: The MIT License is recommended for most projects. It is simple and easy to understand and it places almost no restrictions on what you can do with a jQuery project. If the GPL suits your project better you are also free to use a jQuery project

better you are also free to use a jQuery project under that license. You don’t have to do anything special to choose one license or the other and you don’t have to notify anyone which license you are using. You are free to use a jQuery project in co
